message:
Add exponential backoff and error suppression for poll errors

When Beeper Desktop is closed, the daemon was logging "Could not
connect to the server" every 5 seconds, generating 120K+ identical
log lines. Now: logs first occurrence, then at powers of 2 (2, 4, 8,
16...), and backs off exponentially up to 5 minutes. Prints a
"connection restored" message with suppressed count on recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
